ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the book */,
  "user_rating" REAL /* Average user rating for the book */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the book */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the book in the bookstore */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the book */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the book (e.g., Fiction, Non Fiction) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the book's information */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* Unique International Standard Book Number (ISBN) for each book */,
  "edition" INTEGER /* Edition number of the book */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series if the book is part of a series */,
  "series_order" INTEGER /* Order of the book within the series */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the book */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the book is in stock */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the book data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the book was added to the database */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the book's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the author (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the author */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the author's official website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the author was added to the database */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the author's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the genre was added to the database */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the genre's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent type (for hierarchical types) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the type was added to the database */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the type's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_types_parent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the series was added to the database */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the series information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the publisher was added to the database */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the publisher's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the review was written */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the user's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Customer, Reviewer, Administrator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or comma-separated list of permissions for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was added to the database */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the role's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
